TAUCETI-VERDICT-abec66faa2c0cd4f61ca2713
{"verdict":"block","summary":"One declaration is an outright duplicate wrapper around an existing generic topology instance rather than new TauCeti API.","findings":[{"file":"TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/FundamentalGroupoid/SemilocallySimplyConnected.lean","line":"915","issue":"`Path.Homotopic.Quotient.instTopologicalSpace` redefines the existing quotient topology instance for `Quotient _`; the body is just `inferInstanceAs (TopologicalSpace (Quotient _))`, so this adds a parallel instance for an already-topologized quotient type.","fix":"Remove this instance and rely on the existing generic `TopologicalSpace (Quotient _)` instance directly.","evidence":"The declaration itself proves the replacement: `public instance Path.Homotopic.Quotient.instTopologicalSpace ... := inferInstanceAs (TopologicalSpace (Quotient _))`."}]}

verdict_obj.summary: One declaration is an outright duplicate wrapper around an existing generic topology instance rather than new TauCeti API.

findings.issue: `Path.Homotopic.Quotient.instTopologicalSpace` redefines the existing quotient topology instance for `Quotient _`; the body is just `inferInstanceAs (TopologicalSpace (Quotient _))`, so this adds a parallel instance for an already-topologized quotient type.
findings.fix: Remove this instance and rely on the existing generic `TopologicalSpace (Quotient _)` instance directly.
findings.evidence: The declaration itself proves the replacement: `public instance Path.Homotopic.Quotient.instTopologicalSpace ... := inferInstanceAs (TopologicalSpace (Quotient _))`.
